testPage.note: No test page changes needed — variations are editor-only

output.summary: Added four block variations (Blog, Team Members, Resources, Policies) to DynamicContentCarousel following the Archive block pattern. Each variation pre-sets postsType, uses isActive: ['postsType'] for matching, and has scope: ['inserter', 'transform']. The 'post' variation is marked isDefault: true. Four new carousel-style 24x24 SVG icons were created using filled paths, integer coordinates, and currentColor — one per variation. No PHP changes were needed as this is a purely editor-side feature.
